quarantine.note: Suggestion likely has the right S79+ to S79-SBS merge, but all plus-route decisions are held until the explicit ACE/MTA plus-route policy is implemented.

original_rationale: The ACE routes dataset dictionary uses '+' as a coding convention for SBS (Select Bus Service) routes. The top values ('M14+', 'M34+', 'M86+', 'B44+', 'BX12+', 'Q44+', 'B46+', 'BX41+', 'S79+') correspond one-to-one with SBS routes listed in the bus lane camera report ('M14-SBS', 'M34-SBS', 'M86-SBS', 'B44-SBS', 'BX12-SBS', 'Q44-SBS', 'B46-SBS', 'BX41-SBS', 'S79-SBS'). The ACE Program field confirms this dataset covers ACE camera enforcement routes. 'S79+' is unambiguously the ACE dataset's internal code for the S79-SBS route. 'route_able-s79-sbs' documents the same physical route (borough: Staten Island, streets: Hylan Blvd/Richmond Av) under the S79-SBS designation. They should be merged as the same canonical identity.
required_follow_up: Implement and validate explicit ACE/MTA plus-route identity policy before promoting this decision.
Do not apply this packet directly to data/identity-overrides/merges.json.
